thag10.5:1.1: Full of the many clans of impurities,
thag10.5:3.2: plastered with a stucco of muscle,
thag10.5:3.3: wrapped in a jacket of skin,
thag10.5:3.4: this foul body is of no worth at all.
thag10.5:4.1: Linked together with a chain of bones,
thag10.5:5.2: in the presence of the King of Mortality,
thag10.5:5.3: the man who learns to discard it right here,
thag10.5:6.2: the body’s tied down with a four-fold tie,
thag10.5:6.4: caught in the net of obsessions,
thag10.5:7.3: accompanied with the root of craving,
thag10.5:8.2: compelled by the compulsion of kamma,
thag10.5:8.3: but its attainment ends in ruin.
thag10.5:8.4: Its many becomings go to ruin.
thag10.5:9.1: These who hold to this body as mine
thag10.5:10.1: Those who stay uninvolved with this body
thag10.5:10.2: —as they would with a serpent smeared with dung—
